cases.title: Organizer operations dashboard KPI values update without manual page reload
preconditions: OrganizerAdmin authenticated on event operations dashboard for an active RegistrationOpen or in-progress event
Dashboard displays KPI blocks for registrations, waitlist, check-ins, feedback, and eligibility per docs/ui-ux/09-page-list.md
Background registration or check-in activity occurs via separate API client
steps: Record baseline KPI values visible on dashboard
Trigger a registration or check-in that changes operational totals
Keep dashboard page open and wait for organizer dashboard polling interval to elapse
Observe KPI blocks without clicking browser refresh
cases.expected: KPI values reflect latest operational totals after automatic poll cycle; organizer sees near-real-time dashboard updates without manual full-page reload per NFR-06

cases.title: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/dashboard returns HTTP 200 with updated registration count within one refresh window
preconditions: Published event RegistrationOpen with known baseline registration count
OrganizerAdmin actor authorized for event scope
Fixed clock or controlled timing for deterministic poll window assertions
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/dashboard with OrganizerAdmin bearer token and record registration KPI
Complete a new participant registration via API
Re-query GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/dashboard within organizer dashboard refresh interval
cases.expected: HTTP 200 with JSON envelope; registration metric increments to reflect new registration; backend data is fresh enough for near-real-time organizer visibility on subsequent read

cases.title: Dashboard live refresh shows layout-preserving loading state during background poll
preconditions: Organizer operations dashboard open with existing KPI data rendered
Network throttling or slow API response configured to observe in-flight fetch
steps: Wait for automatic poll cycle to trigger isFetching state
Observe KPI region during background refresh
Verify page does not collapse to spinner-only layout
cases.expected: Existing KPI layout preserved with skeleton or subtle refreshing indicator per docs/ui-ux/00-production-ui-quality-bar.md; no full-page spinner-only state during periodic dashboard refresh

cases.title: Dashboard check-in KPI reflects new check-in within organizer refresh window
preconditions: Event in valid check-in window with known baseline check-in count on dashboard
OrganizerAdmin monitoring dashboard metrics
Participant with Registered status eligible for check-in
steps: Invoke dashboardService.getEventDashboard(eventId) and record check-in KPI baseline
POST check-in for participant via registration module API within same DB transaction boundary
Re-invoke dashboardService.getEventDashboard(eventId) within organizer dashboard polling interval
cases.expected: Check-in KPI increments on subsequent dashboard read; waitlist and registration KPIs remain consistent with authoritative backend state

cases.title: Live dashboard updates use throttled polite aria-live region for assistive tech
preconditions: Organizer dashboard or live-query panel with aria-live region for status changes
Screen reader or accessibility inspector available
steps: Open organizer live dashboard surface
Trigger multiple poll cycles that change connection or KPI summary text
Inspect aria-live attribute and announcement frequency
cases.expected: aria-live is polite (not assertive); announcements are throttled so rapid polling does not flood assistive tech per docs/ui-ux/13-accessibility-basics.md near-real-time update guidance

cases.title: Returning to dashboard tab triggers immediate refetch on window focus
preconditions: Organizer dashboard open with TanStack Query refetchOnWindowFocus enabled
Backend state changed while browser tab was in background
steps: Open organizer dashboard and note KPI values
Switch to another browser tab for longer than one poll interval
Change operational totals via API while tab is backgrounded
Return focus to dashboard tab
cases.expected: Dashboard refetches immediately on window focus and displays updated KPI values without waiting for next scheduled poll interval

cases.title: Failed dashboard poll shows inline error recovery and resumes polling on retry
preconditions: Organizer dashboard using TanStack Query live polling for dashboard data
API temporarily unavailable or returns 5xx during one poll cycle
steps: Simulate API failure during scheduled dashboard poll
Observe error state and retry affordance
Restore API availability and click retry or wait for next poll
Verify KPI data recovers
cases.expected: Inline error with retry action displayed per docs/ui-ux/00-production-ui-quality-bar.md; polling resumes after recovery; organizer receives immediate failure feedback without requiring full page reload per NFR-13

cases.title: Rapid concurrent registrations reflected as consistent final KPI after poll coalescence
preconditions: Event RegistrationOpen with available capacity for multiple concurrent registrations
OrganizerAdmin polling dashboard endpoint at organizer dashboard interval
Multiple participants register in parallel within one refresh window
steps: Record dashboard registration KPI baseline via GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/dashboard
Fire parallel registration requests from distinct participants
Query dashboard after one organizer dashboard interval elapses
cases.expected: Dashboard registration KPI equals authoritative total Registered count; no stale partial count persists after poll cycle despite concurrent writes during the window

cases.title: Design-system live-query panel demonstrates organizer dashboard polling policy
preconditions: web-design-system-shell slice deployed with LiveQueryStatus component
API /api/v1/health reachable via same-origin proxy
steps: Navigate to design-system preview page
Verify live-query panel shows Connected or Degraded badge
Wait at least one organizer dashboard poll interval (~5s)
Observe Refreshing indicator and updated request id without manual reload
cases.expected: Live query panel polls health endpoint on the organizer-dashboard near-real-time interval using shared TanStack Query policy per docs/ui-ux/00-production-ui-quality-bar.md; demonstrates near-real-time infrastructure before full organizer dashboard ships in web-organizer-journeys slice

cases.title: Participant denied GET event dashboard — organizer near-real-time surface is role-scoped
preconditions: Published event with operational activity
Authenticated Participant actor with no organizer role for the event
steps: GET /api/v1/events/{eventId}/dashboard with Participant bearer token
Verify HTTP status and error envelope
cases.expected: HTTP 403 Forbidden (or equivalent documented denial); participant cannot access organizer operations dashboard data; near-real-time polling surfaces remain restricted to OrganizerAdmin/OrganizerStaff per docs/technical/01-roles-permissions.md

cases.title: Dashboard waitlist and registration KPIs reflect FIFO promotion within refresh window
preconditions: Full event with waitlistEnabled and at least one Waitlisted participant
Known baseline waitlist and registration counts on dashboard
Registered participant eligible to cancel within policy triggering promotion
steps: Invoke dashboardService.getEventDashboard(eventId) and record waitlist and registration KPI baselines
Cancel a Registered participant to trigger FIFO waitlist promotion in same DB transaction boundary
Re-invoke dashboardService.getEventDashboard(eventId) within organizer dashboard polling interval
cases.expected: Waitlist KPI decrements and registration KPI remains at capacity; promoted participant state transition from Waitlisted to Registered is reflected on subsequent dashboard read without manual cache invalidation

cases.title: Dashboard event and registration status badges use semantic tokens during live KPI refresh
preconditions: Organizer operations dashboard open for event with mixed registration states
Browser devtools available to inspect computed styles
steps: Open organizer event dashboard and note event lifecycle badge and registration KPI region
Trigger a state-changing operation (registration or check-in) and wait for poll cycle
Inspect badge and KPI status elements for CSS variable token usage after refresh
cases.expected: Event lifecycle and registration status indicators consume semantic color.status.* tokens from docs/ui-ux/04-design-tokens.md; no raw hex literals in feature components; badges remain accessible with text/icon pairing after near-real-time KPI update
